segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Hi, do you know where the gochujang is?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Korean sauces are in aisle three, near the soy sauce.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great, thank you. I'm also looking for short-grain rice.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Big bags are in the back. Smaller bags are on the lower shelf.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. I'm setting up my kitchen, so I'm trying not to buy too much at once.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Do you carry kimchi in smaller containers?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, please. Just one bag should be fine.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes, thanks. This makes me feel a little more settled already.
